subject: Tyranitar V, a large bipedal armored dinosaur-like creature with green rocky plating and red eyes in an aggressive forward-charging pose
description: A massive bipedal creature stands dominant in an aggressive forward-facing pose, filling the frame. Its body is covered in green-toned rocky or armored plating with a darker underbelly. Prominent red eyes and an open jaw suggest fury or mid-attack. Claws are extended at both arms. The background is dark and dramatic with storm-like or debris-filled atmosphere. The V card treatment gives the art an oversized frameless presentation emphasizing the creature's bulk.
foreground: Large armored dinosaur-like creature with green plating, open jaw, extended claws
emotion: aggressive, furious — open jaw, extended claws, forward charge pose
